templatesDescription: Search official gitignore templates, choose the ones that match your stack, and generate a combined .gitignore file.
searchDescription: Filter languages, tools, and environments by name.
emptySelectionLabel: Wählen Sie Vorlagen aus, um .gitignore-Inhalt zu generieren
resultDescription: Templates are combined in a stable order so you can copy, download, and tweak the result.
